taxes.name: global partials plus stage2 reduce
taxes.interpretation: This is the closest decode analogue to prefill's layout tax, but it only explains about 10% on one Q4_K role and still misses llama-class bandwidth.

taxes.name: activation q8 lifecycle not amortized like llama

evidence.note: Only gate+up share a Q4_K activation. k/v are Q6_K (kill attn-input reuse). o and down consume unique activations. No Q4_K activation is shared by >=3 linears.

taxes.interpretation: llama pays activation quant once and reuses it across input-sharing MMVQs; tinygrad's native producer remains blocked and the proven route is lossy/research-only.

taxes.name: existing tinygrad launch-shape env knobs

evidence.gate: one high-share role group moves >=10% relative isolated in-model

taxes.interpretation: The available Q4K/Q6K row-tile and coop toggles do not preserve the standalone fast contract in-model.

taxes.name: MMVQ launch/occupancy contract not preserved in-model

evidence.llama_dominant_contract: wg32 one-wave MMVQ, grid proportional to output rows and split/fusion state

diff_axes.llama: Q8_1 activation produced once and reused by MMVQ consumers
diff_axes.tinygrad: default fp activation path; q8 routes are gated/research and native fused producer is codegen-walled

diff_axes.llama: mul_mat_vec_q dominant rows use wg32 one-wave contracts with large grids such as 131072/393216 and lds=0
diff_axes.tinygrad: role-dependent custom_kernel contracts; Q4 attn coop uses row_i*lane4=128 lanes plus separate partial reduce, Q6 coop writes 16 partial lanes plus reduce, gate/up stays fp path

diff_axes.llama: rocprofv3 gives launch geometry/VGPR/LDS for HIP kernels
diff_axes.tinygrad: HCQ is not visible to rocprofv3; current tinygrad side is code-contract + native attribution, not full launch trace metadata

taxes.interpretation: This is the large remaining transfer loss. It is not exposed by current env knobs and is larger than the measured stage2 tax.

decode_analog_to_prefill.prefill: one dominant layout-conversion tax cancels the fast Tensile kernel
decode_analog_to_prefill.decode: no single clean conversion tax; the measured local stage2 tax is insufficient, q8 lifecycle is capped/lossy, and the large loss is MMVQ contract preservation in-model
